summary: Frontend-only verification of ALPHA VAULT wiring: live News (StockNewsAPI), News-Driven Stock Ideas, live quotes on Top Plays / Future Giants, and DCF Excel export with embedded News sheet. All requested flows pass.

issues: Catalyst dropdown contains a raw API topic value 'Paylimitwall' (passthrough from StockNewsAPI topics field). Cosmetic — recommend filtering/relabeling unknown topics in News.jsx mapArticle or in backend /api/news/market.

action_items: (Optional) Sanitize StockNewsAPI 'topics' values before surfacing as catalyst types — e.g. drop 'paylimitwall' or map to 'Market News'.

(Optional) Sentiment overview 'High Impact Events' read 0 during this run because no article had both non-neutral sentiment AND tickers. Consider relaxing strength rule so highImpact does not stay at 0 when only macro/positive items are returned.
critical_code_review_comments: News.jsx mapArticle infers catalystStrength only from tickers + non-neutral sentiment; many macro StockNewsAPI items have empty tickers so they default to Low and the 'High Impact' KPI can read 0 on quiet news cycles. Consider also using StockNewsAPI 'type' or impact heuristics.
companyUniverse.js: normalizeCompany sets grossMargin = r.ebitdaMargin (copy-paste bug). Not in scope of this test, but should be a separate field.
News ticker filter uses substring `.includes(tickerFilter.toUpperCase())` against each ticker; works but means typing 'A' matches AAPL, AMD, etc. Acceptable for free-text filter.
seed_data_creation: Set localStorage.alphavault_user.hasCompletedOnboarding=true to bypass onboarding for /news, /top-plays, /future-giants, /modeling navigation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All four target flows verified end-to-end via Playwright against https://local-repair-fix.preview.emergentagent.com. Evidence: 40 news-card, 10 news-suggestion-card rendered; none of the three legacy mock headlines (Microsoft Azure 60%, Broadcom VMware $8.5B, Tesla China price cuts) present; sentiment KPI showed 8 positive / 7 negative (non-zero). Filters: ticker filter changed visible count (40->0 for 'AAPL' since no AAPL articles in current StockNewsAPI batch), sentiment=positive -> 8 cards, catalyst='Paylimitwall' -> 10 cards. /top-plays rendered data-testid='top-plays-list' with 25 'Current: $<num>' price strings (e.g. $8.03, $12.88, $22.625). /future-giants rendered data-testid='future-giants-list' with 12 'Price: $<num>' strings (e.g. $8.745, $149.4653). /modeling: searched 'AAPL', clicked dropdown result, dcf-stat-bar visible ($300.26 / DCF $139.77), Export Excel triggered download 'AAPL_DCF_Model.xlsx' and success toast 'AAPL Excel model downloaded' appeared; no error toast detected.
rca of the issue: No bug — all wired logic is functioning. The only observed cosmetic artifact ('Paylimitwall' as a catalyst type) is upstream StockNewsAPI metadata being surfaced verbatim via topics[0] in News.jsx mapArticle.
